reasoning: The current price of Bitcoin is trading in the $115,000-$118,500 range as of early August 2025, down slightly from its July 14 all-time high of ~$123,000. Reaching the $150,000 touch barrier requires approximately a ~28-30% upside from current levels. There are 150 days left in the year. Using an options pricing model (Geometric Brownian Motion) with historical volatility of ~60%, the probability of touching a barrier 30% higher over a 5-month period equates closely to 48-52% (assuming zero drift) and slightly higher with post-halving Q4 momentum. The Manifold estimate was 48% on July 24 when the price was consolidating near $118,700. Since then, the price has seen a mild cooling off closer to $116,000 on average. Thus, adjusting down gently from 48% yields an estimate of around 47%.
